description: Deterministic mapping from reason codes to remediation guidance. SSOT for 'how to fix'.

BLOCKED-MISSING-COMMANDS-HOME.how_to_fix: Set COMMANDS_HOME environment variable or repair binding evidence in governance.paths.json.
BLOCKED-MISSING-COMMANDS-HOME.copy_paste_command: export COMMANDS_HOME=/path/to/commands  # Unix; Windows cmd: set COMMANDS_HOME=C:\path\to\commands

BLOCKED-MISSING-BINDING-FILE.how_to_fix: Run the governance installer to create ${COMMANDS_HOME}/governance.paths.json. Expected schema: {"user_home": "...", "commands_home": "...", "profiles_home": "..."}

BLOCKED-START-REQUIRED.how_to_fix: Run the local bootstrap launcher to bootstrap the governance session before proceeding.

BLOCKED-MISSING-EVIDENCE.how_to_fix: Provide the missing evidence artifact(s). Check SESSION_STATE.Diagnostics.ReasonPayloads for specific requirements.

BLOCKED-RULEBOOK-EVIDENCE-MISSING.how_to_fix: Ensure rulebooks are loaded from trusted paths (${COMMANDS_HOME}, ${PROFILES_HOME}) before marking them as loaded in SESSION_STATE.

BLOCKED-ADDON-CONFLICT.how_to_fix: Two activated addons claim ownership of the same surface. Review addon manifests and ensure owns_surfaces is unique per surface.

BLOCKED-VARIABLE-RESOLUTION.how_to_fix: Check that ${USER_HOME}, ${CONFIG_ROOT}, ${COMMANDS_HOME} are correctly resolved. Verify governance.paths.json exists and is valid.

BLOCKED-WORKSPACE-PERSISTENCE.how_to_fix: Unset OPENCODE_FORCE_READ_ONLY and verify write permissions for commands/workspaces paths.
BLOCKED-WORKSPACE-PERSISTENCE.copy_paste_command: unset OPENCODE_FORCE_READ_ONLY  # Unix; Windows cmd: set OPENCODE_FORCE_READ_ONLY=

BLOCKED-REPO-IDENTITY-MISMATCH.how_to_fix: Workspace fingerprint does not match current repository. Re-bootstrap identity via kernel or remove existing workspace cache.
BLOCKED-REPO-IDENTITY-MISMATCH.copy_paste_command: rm -rf ~/.config/opencode/workspaces/<fingerprint> && opencode-governance-bootstrap  # Unix; Windows cmd: rmdir /s /q %USERPROFILE%\.config\opencode\workspaces\<fingerprint> && opencode-governance-bootstrap.cmd

PERSIST-CONFIRMATION-REQUIRED.how_to_fix: Provide confirmation evidence with exact text 'Persist to workspace memory: YES' to enable persistence.

INTERACTIVE-REQUIRED-IN-PIPELINE.summary: Interactive step requested in pipeline mode
INTERACTIVE-REQUIRED-IN-PIPELINE.how_to_fix: Pipeline mode forbids interactive prompts. Either: (1) switch to user mode, or (2) add pre-approved evidence/config to bypass interaction.

PROMPT-BUDGET-EXCEEDED.summary: Prompt budget exceeded for current mode
PROMPT-BUDGET-EXCEEDED.how_to_fix: Reduce prompts or rerun with higher budget mode. Check SESSION_STATE.PromptBudget for current usage.

BLOCKED-MISSING-RULEBOOK.how_to_fix: Install missing rulebook at ${COMMANDS_HOME}/ or ${PROFILES_HOME}/. Check SESSION_STATE.RulebookLoadEvidence for which file is missing.

BLOCKED-GATE-FAILED.how_to_fix: Review gate output in SESSION_STATE.Gates. Fix identified issues and re-run.

BLOCKED-PHASE-TRANSITION.how_to_fix: Phase transitions must be monotonic with evidence. Check SESSION_STATE.phase and ensure required evidence for next phase.

BLOCKED-MODEL-IDENTITY-UNTRUSTED.summary: Model identity not trusted for audit
BLOCKED-MODEL-IDENTITY-UNTRUSTED.how_to_fix: Set OPENCODE_MODEL_PROVIDER, OPENCODE_MODEL_ID, OPENCODE_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT from installer-owned binding file. Ensure OPENCODE_BINDING_FILE points to a valid governance.paths.json.

BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-REQUIRED.summary: Model context limit required but not provided
BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-REQUIRED.how_to_fix: Set OPENCODE_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT in your binding file (governance.paths.json). Pipeline mode requires binding_env source only.

BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-INVALID.summary: Model context limit is invalid (negative value)
BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-INVALID.how_to_fix: context_limit must be >= 0. Negative values are invalid in all modes.

BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-UNKNOWN.summary: Model context limit could not be determined
BLOCKED-MODEL-CONTEXT-LIMIT-UNKNOWN.how_to_fix: Explicitly set OPENCODE_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT. The hardcoded registry does not contain this model, and inference is not permitted.

BLOCKED-MODEL-METADATA-FETCH-FAILED.how_to_fix: Check provider API connectivity. If provider does not support metadata API, use explicit context limit from activation pack.

BLOCKED-MODEL-IDENTITY-SOURCE-INVALID.how_to_fix: Model identity source must be one of: binding_env, host_capability, provider_metadata, process_env, llm_context, user_input, inferred, unresolved.

BLOCKED-P6-PREREQUISITES-NOT-MET.how_to_fix: Complete required P5 outcomes before entering Phase 6: architecture approved, P5.3 pass, and applicable P5.4/P5.6 compliance.

BLOCKED-P4-INTAKE-MISSING-EVIDENCE.how_to_fix: Persist canonical ticket/task input with matching digest via the productized launcher subcommand, then rerun routing.

BLOCKED-P5-PLAN-RECORD-PERSIST.summary: Phase 5 plan-record evidence missing or persist failed
BLOCKED-P5-PLAN-RECORD-PERSIST.how_to_fix: Persist canonical plan-record evidence via the productized launcher subcommand, then rerun /continue materialization.

default_unmapped.how_to_fix: Check SESSION_STATE.Diagnostics.ReasonPayloads for details. If this is a new reason code, it may need to be added to the remediation map.
